{{Quote|If we are to succeed in our assault, we will need to employ a strategy of my own making… one that requires both skill and cunning… one that ensures us a victory with minimal risk. We will direct our Acclamator ships to unleash their bomber squadrons upon the Rebels until they submit, and then—when they march, arms-raised, from their pitiful, smoldering base '''we will bomb them again!'''|An Imperial officer stationed on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]]|<ref name="EaWI" />}}
An early '''battle''' in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] led to the destruction of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] monitoring outpost on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]].

==Prelude==
When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison stationed on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] obtained information from the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] logs of a captured [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] about a Rebel presence somewhere in a nearby [[Star system/Legends|star system]], the local [[Commander/Legends|commander]] decided to deploy [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droids]] to scout nearby [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. When [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] was revealed to be the home of a Rebel base, an Imperial task force was immediately dispatched to destroy it.

==Battle==
[[File:TIE_Bombing.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] annihilate the Rebel base.]]

The Imperial advance force quickly moved to capture a landing area to allow their commander to land on the battlefield. A group of [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] friendly to the local Rebels decided to attack the Imperials on route to the Rebel base. After a short skirmish, [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout troopers]] used [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]] to destroy the Jawa's [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]] home.

The Imperials moved on to destroy the Rebel [[DSS-02 shield generator/Legends|power generator]] to bring down the base [[SLD-14 shield generator|shield generator]]; after this was done, [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] were called in for a bombing run on the Rebel installation, which included a [[MilBar F-221/Legends|barracks]], a [[Fac L-83|light vehicle factory]] and a [[Communications array/Legends|communications array]]. Using the ruins of the power generator as a command point, the Imperial force moved into the Rebel base to destroy the barracks. After a last-ditch Rebel charge against the Imperials, a final bombing run was called in, obliterating all remaining Rebel forces.

==Behind the scenes==
The Battle of Ryloth is one of two combat training levels in ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''.

Although all Rebel forces on Ryloth are shown to be eliminated in this battle (after which the Empire would presumably take control of the planet), later in the Imperial campaign Ryloth is shown to apparently be under Rebel control once again. The circumstances concerning this reestablishment of Rebel control are not explained.

Much like the previous combat training level, the player can occasionally start with 10,000 credits instead of the intended zero. This allows them to build any ground forces to their liking and easily destroy the Rebel base in the mission.

A bug exists where the Sandcrawler does not spawn at its intended location. This instantly clears the objective, effectively skipping it.
